parents.subject: LU-19237 llite: Update i_version when losing osc/dom lock

commit.subject: LU-19898 kernel: RHEL 10.1 server support
commit.message:
LU-19898 kernel: RHEL 10.1 server support

This patch makes changes to support RHEL 10.1 release
with kernel 6.12.0-124.40.1.el10_1 for Lustre server.

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el10.1 serverdistro=el10.1 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el10.1 serverdistro=el10.1 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el10.1 serverdistro=el10.1 testgroup=full-dne-part-1

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el10.1 serverdistro=el10.1 testgroup=full-dne-part-2

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el10.1 serverdistro=el10.1 testgroup=full-dne-part-3

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el10.1 serverdistro=el10.1 testgroup=full-dne-zfs-part-1

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el10.1 serverdistro=el10.1 testgroup=full-dne-zfs-part-2

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el10.1 serverdistro=el10.1 testgroup=full-dne-zfs-part-3
